## Type of change

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` produces a valid `dist/` output
- [ ] Verified the site renders correctly on desktop and mobile
- [ ] No sensitive information (credentials, internal URLs) is exposed
